summary.intent: Add a generic webhook ingress system to Moltis that can trigger AI agents based on events from GitHub, GitLab, Stripe, and other providers, with a full UI for managing webhooks in settings.
summary.outcome: Fully implemented and merged webhook feature including: new `moltis-webhooks` crate (36 tests), gateway/httpd integration, web UI settings page, documentation, website landing page updates, CORS support, and multiple bug fixes discovered during testing.

repo: Settings sidebar nav icons are rendered via CSS `::before` pseudo-elements in `components.css` using `[data-section='NAME']::before` selectors — NOT from the `icon` property in the JS sections array
There are two style.css files: `src/assets/style.css` (Tailwind output, served) and `src/assets/css/style.css` (older copy, not served) — always edit the Tailwind source via `ui/input.css`
CSS mask-image url() paths in `input.css` are relative to the OUTPUT file location (`src/assets/style.css`), not the input file location (`ui/input.css`)

The `GatewayState` is created then immediately Arc-wrapped; `Arc::get_mut` silently returns None if any clone exists before the call, causing optional fields to stay None — use `OnceLock` for late-initialized fields instead
All existing icons use CSS mask-image with stroke-only SVGs and `background-color: currentColor` — this is the correct pattern for the icon system
The i18n build (`scripts/build-i18n.mjs`) regenerates all language HTML files from the English template via string replacement — run it after any changes to `index.en.html`
The httpd `ssh_routes` compilation error exists on main and is pre-existing (vault feature dependency issue) — not caused by webhook changes
Webhook ingress route must be exempted from session auth middleware in `auth_middleware.rs`
The cron and sandbox pages use `p-4` padding, `text-lg` title, `gap-4` spacing — webhooks should match this pattern
HTM collapses whitespace between tags and text across newlines — use `${" "}` to force explicit spaces between inline elements and text nodes

code.finding: Original two-RwLock implementation had TOCTOU gap — global check then per-webhook check were not atomic. Fixed by using single Mutex holding both windows together.
Byte-indexed string slicing like `&body_text[..500]` panics on multibyte UTF-8. Fixed with a `truncate_str()` helper that walks back to find a char boundary.

Generic profile was using body SHA-256 hash as delivery key fallback, causing identical test payloads to always be deduplicated. Fixed by returning None (no dedup) when no explicit delivery ID header is present.

API responses were returning raw auth_config and source_config fields containing secrets. Fixed by adding a `redacted()` method on Webhook that replaces secret values with `"[redacted]"` and calling it in list/get/update service methods.
CORS headers added via irrefutable `if let Ok(v) = HeaderValue::from_static(...).try_into()` pattern — simplified to direct `HeaderValue::from_static()` call to fix compiler warning.
Settings nav icons defined here as `::before` pseudo-elements with data-section attribute selectors, not in Tailwind/input.css or from JS icon property.

workflow: When wiring optional services into Arc<GatewayState>, prefer OnceLock over Arc::get_mut — the latter silently fails if any Arc clone exists
Test the full HTTP ingress path early with curl — it surfaces integration issues that unit tests miss (auth config, route registration, state wiring)
Browser-based webhook testing tools (Hoppscotch web) cannot reach localhost due to CORS + self-signed cert restrictions — point users to the desktop app or curl
Resolving GitHub PR review conversations requires GraphQL `resolveReviewThread` mutation — the REST API does not support this
For background worker state initialization, create resources before Arc-wrapping the state struct to avoid Arc::get_mut fragility
When adding CSS icon classes, always check components.css for data-section pseudo-element patterns before assuming JS/Tailwind handles it

friction: OAuth token expired at session start, required re-authentication before work could begin
Arc::get_mut silently failed for webhook_store/worker_tx initialization, causing all webhook ingress requests to return 404 — discovered only through manual testing
Settings nav icon showed as black square through multiple icon attempts (icon-link → icon-globe → inline SVG → icon-webhooks CSS class) before discovering the real mechanism in components.css
style.css is gitignored so compiled Tailwind output containing new icon classes was not shipped with commits
Hoppscotch web cannot reach localhost due to CORS restrictions despite the endpoint returning 202 — misleading recommendation to users
Browser cached old icon rendering, making it hard to verify icon fixes were working
PR bot flagged unused imports (useState, ComboSelect) that were actually used in the current code — it reviewed an older commit state
open_items: Live-refresh chat UI when background workers append messages to open sessions (affects both webhooks and cron named sessions) — filed as beads issue moltis-2pu

CIDR allowlist IP checking only extracts from X-Forwarded-For/X-Real-Ip headers; direct connection IP (ConnectInfo) not extracted — needs router-level connect_info configuration for complete enforcement
Translations for webhook feature text in non-English website files — currently stays in English as placeholder
Named session mode creates one session per webhook ID, not per entity — per_entity mode with entity-key-based session grouping needs validation with real provider events
GitLab, Stripe, Linear, PagerDuty, Sentry profiles exist in the plan but only GitHub and generic profiles have detailed implementations in the crate
Response action tools (post comments, merge PRs, issue refunds) are specified in the plan and type system but the tool injection into agent context is not fully wired
Webhook creation UI defaults to static_header auth but allows creation without entering a secret, leading to silent auth failures — should validate or default to 'none'
